accepted_evidence: All 26 primary branches now continue through explicit 7.0-to-3.2-to-0.8 cm tip tapers instead of ending at a visible production-scale cylinder.
All 78 terminal secondary twigs now continue through 3.2-to-1.4-to-0.72 cm collars before meeting a 0.74 cm parent shoot, and every later generation decreases monotonically in radius.
The tangential closeup no longer shows the v5 cylindrical cutoff and preserves readable parent-shoot, branchlet, tertiary, petiole, and leaf hierarchy.
The added transitions cost only 936 trunk vertices and 1716 branchlet triangles while leaving the 19656-card near foliage and 90432-card far crown unchanged.
The final UE 5.8 Metal run has zero material compile errors, zero map-check errors, zero map-check warnings, and no corridor substitution.
rejection_reasons: Bark and interior foliage remain too dark under the fixed review photometry, obscuring fine fissure, petiole, and leaf-surface response despite the improved silhouette.
The single crown remains too regular in live-crown ratio and broad envelope to represent natural variation across open, forest-edge, and closed-stand growth conditions.
Only one open-grown adult form exists; forest-grown adult, intermediate, juvenile, damaged, and deadwood variants remain absent.
No temporal wind and LOD capture, corridor ecology placement, guide or ecology review, or measured desktop and VR performance evidence exists.

review_contract.capture_redistribution: not approved; hashes and reproducible paths only are retained in the open-source repository

next_iteration_requirements: Parameterize and author open-grown adult, forest-grown adult, and intermediate forms with distinct live-crown ratio, branch angle, width, asymmetry, damage, and deterministic seeds.
Rebalance bark ambient response and foliage transmission while preserving physically lit response and the fixed review exposure.
Capture all five isolated views for every required crown form and compare their measured bounds, geometry cost, and distance silhouettes.
Add temporal wind and 28-36 m LOD handoff evidence before any corridor ecology placement.
